title: Image Registry
description: Catalogue of container images the API can launch as sandboxes. Used by editors for autocomplete and inline diagnostics; the Go loader in api/internal/registry performs the authoritative validation at runtime.

images.title: Images
images.description: Image entries evaluated top-to-bottom; the first entry whose match glob matches an image reference wins.

Key.title: Identifier
Key.description: Lowercase identifier starting with a letter, followed by letters, digits, or underscores. Max 63 characters.

Duration.title: Duration
Duration.description: Duration string parsed by Go's time.ParseDuration. Units: ns, us, µs, ms, s, m, h.

Context.title: UI Surface
Context.description: Named UI surface an item can render on. image.create = add-image dialog; image.edit = edit-image drawer; image.card = image tile in the explore/template list; sandbox.create = new-sandbox form; sandbox.card = sandbox tile in the user's sandbox list; sandbox.details = sandbox details and config tab.

ImageEntry.title: Image Entry
ImageEntry.description: Definition for one or more container images that share a match glob, runtime configuration, and metadata schema.

match.title: Match Glob
match.description: Glob matched against image references (repo and optional tag). First matching entry in images wins.

internal_port.title: Container Port
internal_port.description: TCP port the container's primary HTTP service listens on. Used to wire the public URL and the health check.

env.title: Environment Variables
env.description: Environment variables injected into the container. Each value is a Go template rendered against the sandbox TemplateContext (e.g. {{.URL}}, {{.Hostname}}, {{.Meta.<key>}}).

labels.title: Docker Labels
labels.description: Docker labels applied to the container. Each value is a Go template rendered against the sandbox TemplateContext.

post_start.title: Post-Start Commands
post_start.description: Commands executed inside the container after it starts, in declaration order. Later commands may rely on effects of earlier ones.

pre_stop.title: Pre-Stop Commands
pre_stop.description: Commands executed inside the container before it stops, in declaration order.

logs.title: Log Sources
logs.description: Log streams the UI can tail for sandboxes built from this image.

SSHEntry.title: SSH Defaults
SSHEntry.description: Default SSH credentials surfaced to users. Informational only; the platform does not configure or verify the SSH server.

port.title: Port
port.description: Internal TCP port the SSH server listens on.

username.title: Username
username.description: Default SSH username baked into the image.

password.title: Password
password.description: Default SSH password baked into the image.

ExecCommand.title: Exec Command
ExecCommand.description: One command invocation with timing and retry behaviour. Shown as a step in the lifecycle log.

command.title: Command
command.description: Argv array. Each element is a Go template rendered against the sandbox TemplateContext.

label.title: Label
label.description: Human-readable step label shown in lifecycle log output.

timeout.title: Attempt Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum duration of a single attempt before it is aborted.

retries.title: Retries
retries.description: Additional attempts after the first failure. 0 means no retries.

HealthCheck.title: Health Check
HealthCheck.description: HTTP GET probe against the container's internal_port. A sandbox is considered ready once the probe returns 2xx.

timeout.title: Request Timeout
timeout.description: Maximum duration of a single probe request.

LogSource.title: Log Source
LogSource.description: One tailable log stream exposed to the UI.

label.title: Label
label.description: Human-readable label shown in the log selector.

type.title: Type
type.description: Log source kind. docker = container stdout/stderr; file = file inside the container (requires path); lifecycle = platform-emitted post_start and pre_stop output.

path.title: File Path
path.description: Absolute path inside the container. Required when type=file; must be omitted for docker and lifecycle.

MetadataSchema.title: Metadata Schema
MetadataSchema.description: Declares the fields, actions, and display values this image exposes to the UI.

groups.title: Groups
groups.description: Named sections used to group items in forms and detail views. Rendered in declaration order; referenced by an item's group key.

items.title: Items
items.description: Metadata entries. Each item is one of three variants discriminated by type: field (user-editable), action (link or button), or display (read-only value).

label.title: Label
label.description: Section heading shown in the UI.

description.title: Description
description.description: Helper text shown beneath the section heading.

FieldDependency.title: Field Dependency
FieldDependency.description: Shows the dependent item only when another field item's stored value equals value (exact string match).

field.title: Field Key
field.description: Key of another field item in the same metadata schema.

value.title: Value
value.description: Required value of the referenced field for this item to render.

Visibility.title: Visibility
Visibility.description: Controls where and when a metadata item renders.

contexts.title: Contexts
contexts.description: UI surfaces this item appears on. Omit or leave empty to render on every surface.

condition.title: Runtime Condition
condition.description: Runtime gate evaluated by the frontend. Only "ready" is recognized today (disables the item until the sandbox reports ready); any other value is ignored.

SelectOption.title: Select Option
SelectOption.description: One choice in a select or multiselect field.

value.title: Value
value.description: Stored value written to sandbox metadata.

label.title: Label
label.description: Label shown in the UI for this option.

FieldSpec.title: Field
FieldSpec.description: User-editable input. Values are always stored as strings; booleans, numbers, and multiselect values use a string encoding on the wire.

input.title: Input Kind
input.description: Rendered control and string-encoding convention. text = single-line text; password = masked single-line text; number = decimal string; email = email-validated text; url = url-validated text; select = one value from options; multiselect = comma-joined subset of options; toggle = "true" or "false"; textarea = multi-line text.

default.title: Default
default.description: Default value used when no sandbox value is set. Also feeds {{.Meta.<key>}} during template rendering.

placeholder.title: Placeholder
placeholder.description: Placeholder text shown in empty inputs.

help_text.title: Help Text
help_text.description: Guidance rendered alongside the control and wired to aria-describedby.

required.title: Required
required.description: If true, the form cannot be submitted without a value.

read_only.title: Read-Only
read_only.description: If true, the value is displayed but not editable. Use for platform-assigned values.

options.title: Options
options.description: Available choices. Required and non-empty when input is select or multiselect; must be omitted for other input kinds.

url.title: URL
url.description: Go template producing an absolute URL, rendered server-side against the sandbox TemplateContext. Wrap user-controlled interpolations with urlquery, e.g. {{.URL}}/admin?u={{ urlquery .Meta.admin_user }}.

variant.title: Variant
variant.description: Button visual style. default = primary; outline = secondary; destructive = danger (requires confirm).

size.title: Size
size.description: Button size. default = standard; icon = compact icon-only.

target.title: Target
target.description: Anchor target. Defaults to _blank when omitted.

confirm.title: Confirm Prompt
confirm.description: Confirmation prompt shown before the action runs. Required when variant=destructive; ignored otherwise.

DisplaySpec.title: Display
DisplaySpec.description: Read-only value shown in the UI.

value.title: Value
value.description: Go template rendered to a plain string server-side against the sandbox TemplateContext.

format.title: Format
format.description: Render style. text = plain text; code = monospace block; badge = status pill; link = clickable URL; password = masked with reveal toggle and treated as secret end-to-end.

copyable.title: Copyable
copyable.description: Adds a copy-to-clipboard button next to the value.

MetadataItem.title: Metadata Item
MetadataItem.description: One entry in metadata.items. Discriminated by type into a field, action, or display variant; exactly one of the matching sub-objects must be present.

label.title: Label
label.description: Label shown next to the control.

icon.title: Icon
icon.description: Lucide icon name (e.g. user, lock, mail).

group.title: Group
group.description: Key of a metadata group declared in metadata.groups.

ActionItem.title: Action Item
ActionItem.description: Clickable link or button metadata item (type=action).

icon.title: Icon
icon.description: Lucide icon name (e.g. user, lock, mail).

group.title: Group
group.description: Key of a metadata group declared in metadata.groups.

label.title: Label
label.description: Label shown above or beside the value.

icon.title: Icon
icon.description: Lucide icon name (e.g. user, lock, mail).

group.title: Group
group.description: Key of a metadata group declared in metadata.groups.
